description_long: This is an ornate, three-armed candelabrum lamp with a highly decorative central stem and base, featuring intricate metalwork and elaborate scrollwork on the arms. The lamp has three upward-facing holders, each designed to accommodate a candle or similar light source, with the central holder elevated above the two side holders. The base is wide and circular, providing stability, and is adorned with detailed engravings and patterns. The arms curve outward gracefully, ending in rounded, cup-like receptacles for the light sources. The entire lamp is finished in a dark metallic color, giving it a classic, antique appearance. This type of lamp is often found in upscale urban environments, such as parks, plazas, or historic streetscapes.
description: An ornate, three-armed candelabrum lamp with intricate metalwork, scrollwork arms, and a decorative base, finished in dark metal.
description_view_0: The lamp is seen from the side, showing the central stem and two of the three holders aligned vertically, with the ornate base visible.
description_view_1: The lamp is viewed from the front, displaying all three arms and holders symmetrically, with the scrollwork and decorative details most prominent.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the lamp is seen from the opposite side, again showing the central stem and two holders aligned vertically.
description_view_3: A rear view of the lamp, mirroring the front, with all three arms and holders visible and the ornate details on full display.
